name: Meowhiss the snake
short_description: "Meowhiss the snake" is a cute 2D game whose core gameplay is based on classic Snake, but also combined with some roguelike elements for you to explore. Before losing all the head-body, gear up your character, reach more levels, and get more scores!
detailed_description:
Game Features

  • Find ways to get more scores and gain your place on the leaderboard.

  • Your head-body (body length) is your health. Unlike the classic snake, a single impact will not kill you. The game will only end when your head-body is down to zero. As long as you're long enough, you can keep hitting trees, rocks and slimes(it's better to hit less though).

  • Enhance the abilities of Meowhiss, use props rationally, collect the most desired miracles, continue to hit the next level and improve your score!

  • Also, if you are confused about anything, please try asking Mr.Black for help.

About game production

This is the first game from our GingerSoup Studio. It has many shortcomings. We hope everyone can give us real feedback and we will try our best to improve the game little by little. If the game doesn't suit your taste, please add it to your wishlist and give us a helping hand.

Finally, thanks for playing.

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Russian, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
